tasks.label: torpedo-param-audit
args: Import-Module ImportExcel; $modPath='c:\Users\User\AppData\LocalLow\Deep Water Studio\UBOAT\Mods\uboat-the-arcade-mod\Data Sheets\Entities.xlsx'; $origPath='D:\Steam\steamapps\common\UBOAT\UBOAT_Data\Data Sheets\Entities.xlsx'; $modT=@(Import-Excel $modPath -WorksheetName 'Equipment'|Where-Object{[string]$_.Tags -eq 'Torpedo'}); $origT=@(Import-Excel $origPath -WorksheetName 'Equipment'|Where-Object{[string]$_.Tags -eq 'Torpedo'}); function ParseParams([string]$s){ $d=@{}; if([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($s)){ return $d }; foreach($part in ($s -split ',')){ $kv=$part.Trim(); if($kv -match '^([^=]+)=(.+)$'){ $k=$matches[1].Trim(); $v=$matches[2].Trim(); $d[$k]=$v } }; return $d }; $origRows=@(); foreach($r in $origT){ $origRows += [pscustomobject]@{Id=$r.'/';Map=(ParseParams ([string]$r.Parameters))} }; $modRows=@(); foreach($r in $modT){ $modRows += [pscustomobject]@{Id=$r.'/';Map=(ParseParams ([string]$r.Parameters))} }; $origKeys=@($origRows|ForEach-Object{$_.Map.Keys}|Select-Object -Unique|Sort-Object); $modKeys=@($modRows|ForEach-Object{$_.Map.Keys}|Select-Object -Unique|Sort-Object); $missingInMod=@($origKeys|Where-Object{$_ -notin $modKeys}); $extraInMod=@($modKeys|Where-Object{$_ -notin $origKeys}); $keyStats=@(); foreach($k in $origKeys){ $vals=@($origRows|ForEach-Object{$_.Map[$k]}|Where-Object{$_ -ne $null -and $_ -ne ''}); $allNum=$true; $nums=@(); foreach($v in $vals){$n=0.0; if([double]::TryParse([string]$v,[System.Globalization.NumberStyles]::Any,[System.Globalization.CultureInfo]::InvariantCulture,[ref]$n)){$nums+=$n}else{$allNum=$false;break}}; if($allNum -and $nums.Count -gt 0){$keyStats+=[pscustomobject]@{Parameter=$k;Type='numeric';Min=($nums|Measure-Object -Minimum).Minimum;Max=($nums|Measure-Object -Maximum).Maximum;UniqueCount=@($vals|Select-Object -Unique).Count}} else {$u=@($vals|Select-Object -Unique); $s=@($u|Sort-Object); $keyStats+=[pscustomobject]@{Parameter=$k;Type='text';Min=$s[0];Max=$s[$s.Count-1];UniqueCount=$u.Count}} }; $nonUniform=@(); foreach($k in $modKeys){ $vals=@($modRows|ForEach-Object{$_.Map[$k]}|Where-Object{$_ -ne $null -and $_ -ne ''}|Select-Object -Unique); if($vals.Count -gt 1){ $nonUniform += [pscustomobject]@{Parameter=$k;UniqueCount=$vals.Count;Examples=(@($vals|Select-Object -First 8)-join ' | ')} } }; $missingPerRow=@(); foreach($r in $modRows){ $keys=@($r.Map.Keys); $miss=@($modKeys|Where-Object{$_ -notin $keys}); if($miss.Count -gt 0){ $missingPerRow += [pscustomobject]@{Id=$r.Id;MissingKeys=($miss -join ', ')} } }; $res=[pscustomobject]@{originalTorpedoes=$origRows.Count;modTorpedoes=$modRows.Count;originalParamKeys=$origKeys;modParamKeys=$modKeys;missingParamKeysInMod=$missingInMod;extraParamKeysInMod=$extraInMod;paramStatsOriginal=@($keyStats|Sort-Object Parameter);modNonUniformParamValues=@($nonUniform|Sort-Object Parameter);modRowsMissingAnyModParamKey=@($missingPerRow)}; $out='c:\Users\User\AppData\LocalLow\Deep Water Studio\UBOAT\Mods\uboat-the-arcade-mod\torpedo-parameters-audit.json'; $res|ConvertTo-Json -Depth 8 | Set-Content $out -Encoding UTF8; Write-Output "Wrote $out"
